sub_mechanisms: M_1: assign K independent attention-head importance criteria per token
M_2: compute truncated-inclusion-exclusion sum to level r for joint-criterion satisfaction
M_3: extract upper-bound count of jointly-important tokens
M_4: prune the complement (low-importance) set with explicit bound guarantee
stripped_llm_application: Per token, compute K independent importance-criterion scores from K attention heads; apply a truncated alternating-sum formula (inclusion-exclusion bounded at level r) to estimate the joint-satisfaction count with explicit error term; prune tokens outside the bounded important-set.
novelty_claim_stripped: Gradient-based pruning (GBLM-Pruner) and task-specific weight pruning (LLM-Sieve, despite vocabulary similarity) use single-criterion thresholding; truncated inclusion-exclusion bound is a multi-criterion JOINT sift with provable error term.
